tests.name: Policy overlays shape runtime behavior
tests.expected_result: OpenClaw runtime behavior changes through Cortex policy without replacing OpenClaw session mechanics.

tests.name: Semantic processing reduces context pressure
tests.expected_result: Boundary-triggered semantic processing produces compact continuity objects that support smaller-window runs.

tests.name: Tentative cross-thread memory works
tests.expected_result: High-signal notions can be seen cross-thread as tentative memory before reconciliation.

tests.name: Reconciliation hardens durable memory
tests.expected_result: Session-end or checkpoint reconciliation confirms, merges, downgrades, or rejects tentative memory.

tests.name: Artifacts split cleanly across Layer 4 and Layer 5
tests.expected_result: Layer 4 operational knowledge is usable with or without a Layer 5 artifact, while Layer 5 remains canonical only when canon is warranted.

tests.name: Reflection cleanup keeps hot memory lean
tests.expected_result: Reflection can prune, merge, and demote low-value QMD notions without turning Layer 2 into durable authority.
